name: Emmanuel HAKUZIMANA
description: Promoting health and wellness to the community through digital technology.
bio: As a Registered Nutritionist and Nursing Professional, I am passionate about transforming healthcare through AI-driven solutions. Growing up in Rwanda, I saw the impact of non-communicable diseases (NCDs) and the need for accessible, preventive care. That’s why I founded Vitaway Health to bridge the gap between patients and providers with personalized, sustainable health solutions. I meet people where they are, guiding them toward lasting change, one habit at a time. At Vitaway, better health isn’t just a goal, it’s a way of life.

name: Steven SHIMIRWA
description: Innovation powered by collaboration and critical thinking enhances and makes my work about health enhancement a success.

name: Patience MANIRABONA
description: Software developer dedicated to creating innovative solutions for advancing different societies.

name: Emmanuel Murindwa
description: Public Health professional with expertise in Nutrition and Social Behavior Change (SBC). He holds a Bachelor’s degree in Human Nutrition and Dietetics from the University of Rwanda and is a registered Nutritionist under the Rwanda Allied Health Professional Council (RAHPC)
bio: Emmanuel specializes in creating personalized meal plans for individuals with Non-Communicable Diseases (NCDs) and provides nutrition counseling across various life stages. He has worked as a Social Behavior Change Officer at Three Stones International and he is also actively involved in volunteering with organizations like the Rwanda NCD Alliance and Health Alert Organization, focusing on NCD prevention and public health advocacy.

name: Nathanaella Hirwa
description: Detail-oriented professional with experience in data collection, entry, and machine learning models.
bio: I'm a detail-oriented professional with experience in data collection and entry, committed to delivering high-quality work. I hold a Virtual Assistance certificate, which has helped me manage tasks efficiently. Currently pursuing a Bachelor's in Software Engineering, I'm eager to combine my administrative skills with my growing technical knowledge to contribute to an innovative team.

name: Sandra AKEZA MUKAMUGEMA
description: Providing expert guidance on managing chronic conditions through balanced, nutrient-rich diets and sustainable living.
bio: Registered  Nutritionist dedicated to provide support for managing chronic conditions like Diabetes, heart diseases, Hypertension and  guiding  individuals to ward balanced, Nutrient-rich diets that support health, sustainability and ethical living.

name: Joseph KAREMERA RN
description: Dedicated to preventing and managing non-communicable diseases through medical nutrition therapy and public health research.
bio: Joseph Karemera has been working in Rwanda health care system for more than five years, his experience range from clinical, public health, and Research. He is clinical Nutritionist and Dietician by training. His career focuses in Non-communicable disease prevention, management and control and Research. Using he is gained knowledge and skills in Nutrition and dietetic together with his master’s degree in Public health and disease control, he is mission aims to establish at which level the primary non-communicable diseases risk factors lead to secondary risk factors such as elevated blood pressure and sugar…etc. and its reverse using medical nutrition therapy in Africa Population.
